title: teucrium commune var. maritimum
intro: Teucrium commune var. maritimum, also known as Sea Germander, is a plant species in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sea Germander include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
